programmes.show_description: Laura McGhie with your calls and features through the night. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Highlights from Big Boss Interview, the BBC Sounds series where chief executives and entrepreneurs share their experiences of running some of the world's biggest businesses.
Rima Ahmed and Steffan Powell present with unique stories from across the UK, explaining details behind the headlines, and the biggest news and sport.
Nicky Campbell takes your calls on the day's talking points, hearing views and experiences from across the UK. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines).
Adrian Chiles gets you set for the weekend with a good-humoured look at the latest news, sport and entertainment. Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Elis has a chance to make history by Cymru Connecting with 5 callers in a row. National pride can be restored as long as Elis opens his eyes and doesn't go down a Cymru cul-de-sac.
John Murray, Ian Dennis & Ali Bruce-Ball look ahead to the FA Cup quarter-final weekend and reflect on England's far from sizzling World Cup send off.
Aaron Paul is joined by Marc Albrighton, Mark Bonner and Jon Brady for around-the-grounds coverage of today's EFL fixtures.
A round-up of the day's top news and sport with Sean Farrington and Kylie Pentelow. Plus interviews with people at the centre of the stories, and regular travel updates.
Darren Fletcher is joined by Glenn Murray, Kevin Nolan and Nigel Reo-Coker to look ahead to the weekend's FA Cup quarter-final football action.
Live rugby union commentary of Northampton Saints v Castres in the last 16 of the European Champions Cup. Listen to full match commentary on Sports Extra.
The day's main news stories, topical debate and interviews. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Email: nolan@bbc.co.uk.
Laura McGhie with your calls and features through the night. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Discussion, analysis and the latest news from big fight nights and the world of boxing with Steve Bunce.
The big news and sports stories, weather, plus previews of the weekend's sport with Eleanor Oldroyd and Jeanette Kwakye. Text: 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Paddy is joined by Ed Gamble and Steve Bracknall. MC Hammersmith will be in the '5 Live Lounge' rapping for one of our 5 Live commentators.
Alfie Brown, Jeanette Kwakye, Luke Moore and Mark Watson join the fight for punditry points whilst discussing the world of sport with Rick Edwards.
Mark Chapman is joined by Dion Dublin, Rachel Corsie and Statman Dave to build up today's sporting action, plus updates from Manchester City v Liverpool in the FA Cup quarter-final.
Live rugby union commentary of Bath v Saracens in the European Champions Cup.
Live football commentary of Chelsea v Port Vale in the quarter-final of the FA Cup.
Maz Farookhi builds up to Southampton v Arsenal in the quarter-final of the FA Cup.
Live football commentary of Southampton v Arsenal in the quarter-final of the FA Cup.
Live heavyweight boxing commentary of Derek Chisora v Deontay Wilder at the O2 Arena in London, presented by Jonathan Overend, Steve Bunce, Richie Woodall and Alice Scarff.
The day's main news stories, topical debate and interviews. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Email: nolan@bbc.co.uk.
